name: Turkey in Jalapeno Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jalapeno Cream Sauce as per the recipe in section 2.
2. Cut boneless, skinless turkey breasts (about 1 lb each) into 3 slices.
3. Flatten each slice to a thickness of 1/4 inch between sheets of waxed paper or plastic wrap.
4. Mix flour, salt, and pepper; coat turkey slices with the mixture.
5. Melt margarine in a 10-inch skillet until melted.
6. Cook turkey in the melted margarine, turning once, until cooked through (about 8 minutes).
7. Serve with Jalapeno Cream Sauce.
